_meta.keyKnowledge: We rehearse and perform music for audiences using relevant vocal and instrumental techniques and performance skills.

_source.w: We rehearse and perform music for audiences using relevant vocal and instrumental techniques and performance skills.
y: Live performance is the culmination of our musical development and the most direct way to share our work.
Rehearsal discipline and performance skills are transferable to many areas of life.
Performing for audiences creates a unique connection between musicians and listeners.
eg: We rehearse methodically, focusing on technical accuracy, expression and ensemble cohesion.
We perform in both solo and ensemble settings for a variety of audiences.
We apply appropriate performance conventions for the style of music we are presenting.
We manage performance anxiety through preparation and breathing techniques.
We evaluate our performances and set goals for ongoing improvement.
We present performances that demonstrate both technical skill and musical expression.
